title: ICAR AIEEA PG 2026 Application Form

detail.title: ICAR AIEEA PG 2026 Application Form
detail.short_info: ICAR AIEEA PG 2026 Application Form is open now. Apply online from 8 May to 7 June 2026. Check eligibility, application fee, important dates, steps to apply, and official links for ICAR PG entrance exam.

content.text: ICAR AIEEA PG 2026 Application Form has been released by the National Testing Agency (NTA). Registration started on 8 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 7 June 2026. This entrance exam is conducted for admission to Master’s degree programmes in Agriculture and Allied Sciences at ICAR institutions and State Agricultural Universities.

Candidates can fill the online application form on the official NTA website. This article provides complete details including eligibility criteria, application fee, step-by-step application process, important dates, exam pattern, and direct links to apply.

rows: Bachelor’s degree in relevant subject with minimum OGPA / marks (60% for General/OBC/EWS, 50% for SC/ST/PwBD)
4/5/6-year Bachelor’s degree in Agriculture / Allied Sciences

content.text: Note: Processing charges & GST are additional as applicable.

sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR AIEEA PG 2026 (Step-by-Step Guide)

items: Visit the official registration portal: exams.nta.nic.in/registration
Click on the New Registration link.
Fill basic details and complete registration.
Login using Application Number and Password.
Submit and download the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Documents Required for ICAR AIEEA PG 2026

items: Scanned copy of Class 10th certificate for age proof

seo_tags: how to apply ICAR AIEEA PG 2026
